requirement_topic.en: SABER Conformity Assessment — PCoC + SCoC (Multi-Standard: Safety + EMC + Energy)
requirement_topic.zh: SABER合格评定——PCoC + SCoC（多标准：安全 + 电磁兼容 + 能效）
requirement_topic.zht: SABER合格評定——PCoC + SCoC（多標準：安全 + 電磁相容 + 能效）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances placed on the Saudi market must be cleared through the SABER electronic conformity-assessment platform operated by SASO. There is no single mark; instead the Saudi importer must obtain two documents: (1) a Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC) — a model/product-level certificate (typically valid one year) issued by a SASO-approved conformity assessment body, confirming the product meets all applicable SASO technical regulations and adopted standards, namely electrical safety to IEC 60335-2-24, EMC to the IEC CISPR 14 series, and energy efficiency/labelling to SASO 2892 / SASO 2663 with the SEEC label; and (2) a Shipment Certificate of Conformity (SCoC) — issued for each individual consignment before it clears customs, referencing the valid PCoC. Both are processed on SABER; the importer registers the product, uploads the technical file and test reports, and the approved conformity assessment body issues the certificates. The Saudi grid is 230/400 V, 60 Hz, and appliances must be rated and tested accordingly.
summary.zh: 投放沙特市场的家用制冷器具须通过SASO运营的SABER电子合格评定平台清关。沙特没有单一标识；沙特进口商须取得两份文件：（1）产品符合性证书（PCoC）——由SASO批准的合格评定机构签发的型号/产品级证书（通常有效期一年），确认产品符合所有适用的SASO技术法规及采用标准，即电气安全须符合IEC 60335-2-24、电磁兼容须符合IEC CISPR 14系列、能效/标识须符合SASO 2892 / SASO 2663并附SEEC标签；（2）货物符合性证书（SCoC）——为每批货物在清关前签发，引用有效的PCoC。两者均在SABER上办理；进口商注册产品、上传技术文件及检测报告，由批准的合格评定机构签发证书。沙特电网为230/400 V、60 Hz，器具须据此标定并测试。
summary.zht: 投放沙特市場的家用製冷器具須通過SASO運營的SABER電子合格評定平台清關。沙特沒有單一標識；沙特進口商須取得兩份文件：（1）產品符合性證書（PCoC）——由SASO批准的合格評定機構簽發的型號/產品級證書（通常有效期一年），確認產品符合所有適用的SASO技術法規及採用標準，即電氣安全須符合IEC 60335-2-24、電磁相容須符合IEC CISPR 14系列、能效/標識須符合SASO 2892 / SASO 2663並附SEEC標籤；（2）貨物符合性證書（SCoC）——為每批貨物在清關前簽發，引用有效的PCoC。兩者均在SABER上辦理；進口商註冊產品、上傳技術文件及檢測報告，由批准的合格評定機構簽發證書。沙特電網為230/400 V、60 Hz，器具須據此標定並測試。

standards_or_laws: SABER platform (saber.sa) — mandatory electronic conformity assessment operated by SASO
Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC) — model-level certificate (typically 1-year validity) from a SASO-approved conformity assessment body
Shipment Certificate of Conformity (SCoC) — per-consignment certificate required before customs clearance
IEC 60335-2-24 — electrical safety (adopted via SASO); IEC CISPR 14 series — EMC; SASO 2892 / SASO 2663 — energy efficiency and SEEC labelling
Saudi grid: 230/400 V, 60 Hz — appliance rating and test configuration basis

summary.en: In China, household refrigerating appliances require China Compulsory Certification (CCC) covering both safety (GB 4706.13) and EMC (GB 4343.1) before sale. CCC is a mandatory third-party certification administered by CNCA-designated certification bodies (CABs); it does not involve manufacturer self-declaration. Energy labelling (China Energy Label based on GB 12021.2) is a separate mandatory requirement administered by NDRC/SAMR. There is no Chinese equivalent to the SABER per-shipment SCoC: CCC is a one-time product certification, not a consignment-level customs gate, and the China Energy Label is separately issued and displayed.
summary.zh: 在中国，家用制冷器具在销售前须取得中国强制认证（CCC），涵盖安全（GB 4706.13）和电磁兼容（GB 4343.1）两项内容。CCC为强制性第三方认证，由CNCA指定认证机构（CAB）审核；制造商无需进行自我声明。能效标识（基于GB 12021.2的中国能效标识）是由NDRC/SAMR管理的独立强制性要求。中国没有与SABER每批货物SCoC等同的制度：CCC为一次性产品认证，而非货物级海关门槛，中国能效标识则分别颁发和展示。
summary.zht: 在中國，家用製冷器具在銷售前須取得中國強制認證（CCC），涵蓋安全（GB 4706.13）和電磁相容（GB 4343.1）兩項內容。CCC為強制性第三方認證，由CNCA指定認證機構（CAB）審核；製造商無需進行自我聲明。能效標識（基於GB 12021.2的中國能效標識）是由NDRC/SAMR管理的獨立強制性要求。中國沒有與SABER每批貨物SCoC等同的制度：CCC為一次性產品認證，而非貨物級海關門檻，中國能效標識則分別頒發和展示。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — safety (GB 4706.13) + EMC (GB 4343.1); mandatory; administered by CNCA/SAMR
China Energy Label — Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR); based on GB 12021.2-2015

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers must build a complete Saudi conformity package from scratch — CCC and the China Energy Label do not substitute for any Saudi requirement: (1) Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC) — obtained via SABER from a SASO-approved conformity assessment body, based on test reports to IEC 60335-2-24 (safety), IEC CISPR 14 (EMC), and SASO 2892 / SASO 2663 (energy, high-ambient); (2) Shipment Certificate of Conformity (SCoC) — issued per consignment before customs clearance at Jeddah / Dammam; (3) SEEC Arabic energy label affixed to the product; (4) technical file — test reports, ratings for 230/400 V 60 Hz operation, energy data at T-class high-ambient conditions; (5) a Saudi importer of record to register the product on SABER (see row frigsa-market-002). Crucially, the PCoC/SCoC are obtained by the Saudi importer, not self-declared by the Chinese manufacturer — the manufacturer's role is to supply compliant product and accepted test reports (commonly IECEE CB Scheme or ILAC MRA reports). CNAS-only GB test reports are not accepted without a SASO-approved CAB's acceptance.
gap.zh: 中国制造商须从头建立完整的沙特合规文件包——CCC和中国能效标识均不能替代任何沙特要求：（1）产品符合性证书（PCoC）——通过SABER向SASO批准的合格评定机构取得，依据IEC 60335-2-24（安全）、IEC CISPR 14（电磁兼容）及SASO 2892 / SASO 2663（能效，高环境温度）的检测报告；（2）货物符合性证书（SCoC）——为每批货物在吉达/达曼清关前签发；（3）加贴于产品的SEEC阿拉伯文能效标签；（4）技术文件——检测报告、230/400 V 60 Hz运行标定、T类高环境温度条件下的能效数据；（5）须有沙特进口记录方在SABER上注册产品（详见frigsa-market-002行）。关键在于：PCoC/SCoC由沙特进口商取得，而非中国制造商自我声明——制造商的职责是提供合规产品及被接受的检测报告（通常为IECEE CB体系或ILAC MRA报告）。仅有CNAS的GB检测报告未经SASO批准的CAB接受不被认可。
gap.zht: 中國製造商須從頭建立完整的沙特合規文件包——CCC和中國能效標識均不能替代任何沙特要求：（1）產品符合性證書（PCoC）——通過SABER向SASO批准的合格評定機構取得，依據IEC 60335-2-24（安全）、IEC CISPR 14（電磁相容）及SASO 2892 / SASO 2663（能效，高環境溫度）的檢測報告；（2）貨物符合性證書（SCoC）——為每批貨物在吉達/達曼清關前簽發；（3）加貼於產品的SEEC阿拉伯文能效標籤；（4）技術文件——檢測報告、230/400 V 60 Hz運行標定、T類高環境溫度條件下的能效數據；（5）須有沙特進口記錄方在SABER上註冊產品（詳見frigsa-market-002行）。關鍵在於：PCoC/SCoC由沙特進口商取得，而非中國製造商自我聲明——製造商的職責是提供合規產品及被接受的檢測報告（通常為IECEE CB體系或ILAC MRA報告）。僅有CNAS的GB檢測報告未經SASO批准的CAB接受不被認可。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — a valid PCoC plus a per-shipment SCoC issued through SABER are required before customs clearance; the SEEC energy label and high-ambient energy compliance are conditions of the PCoC
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification (safety + EMC) + China Energy Label display required before sale in China

source.publisher: SABER platform / Saudi Standards, Metrology and Quality Organization (SASO)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] SABER conformity assessment — a model-level Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC) plus a per-shipment Shipment Certificate of Conformity (SCoC) — is mandatory for Saudi market access for household refrigerators, covering safety (IEC 60335-2-24), EMC (CISPR 14), and energy (SASO 2892/2663 + SEEC label). Chinese CCC and the China Energy Label are entirely separate systems and substitute for none of these. The PCoC/SCoC are obtained by the Saudi importer; the manufacturer must supply compliant product, 230/400 V 60 Hz ratings, and SASO-accepted test reports.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] SABER合格评定——型号级产品符合性证书（PCoC）加每批货物的货物符合性证书（SCoC）——是家用电冰箱进入沙特市场的强制要求，涵盖安全（IEC 60335-2-24）、电磁兼容（CISPR 14）及能效（SASO 2892/2663 + SEEC标签）。中国CCC和中国能效标识是完全独立的制度，均不能替代上述任何一项。PCoC/SCoC由沙特进口商取得；制造商须提供合规产品、230/400 V 60 Hz标定及SASO接受的检测报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] SABER合格評定——型號級產品符合性證書（PCoC）加每批貨物的貨物符合性證書（SCoC）——是家用電冰箱進入沙特市場的強制要求，涵蓋安全（IEC 60335-2-24）、電磁相容（CISPR 14）及能效（SASO 2892/2663 + SEEC標籤）。中國CCC和中國能效標識是完全獨立的制度，均不能替代上述任何一項。PCoC/SCoC由沙特進口商取得；製造商須提供合規產品、230/400 V 60 Hz標定及SASO接受的檢測報告。

requirement_topic.en: Saudi Importer of Record — SABER Registration Holder (Responsible Local Operator)
requirement_topic.zh: 沙特进口记录方——SABER注册持有人（责任本地运营商）
requirement_topic.zht: 沙特進口記錄方——SABER註冊持有人（責任本地運營商）

summary.en: Under the SASO/SABER regime, the entity that registers a regulated product and obtains the Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC) and Shipment Certificate of Conformity (SCoC) must be a Saudi-resident importer of record — a legally established business in Saudi Arabia holding a valid commercial registration and a SABER account. For household refrigerating appliances manufactured outside Saudi Arabia (including China), there is no manufacturer self-declaration route and no foreign-entity registration: a Saudi importer must hold the SABER registration, the PCoC, and obtain a per-shipment SCoC before goods clear customs at ports such as Jeddah and Dammam. The Saudi importer is the responsible local operator: it holds the technical file and test reports, interacts with the SASO-approved conformity assessment body, cooperates with SASO market surveillance, and bears responsibility for product compliance, recalls, and corrective action. This role cannot be fulfilled by a freight forwarder, customs broker, or test laboratory — it must be a registered Saudi importing entity.
summary.zh: 在SASO/SABER制度下，注册受管制产品并取得产品符合性证书（PCoC）及货物符合性证书（SCoC）的主体须为沙特境内的进口记录方——在沙特合法设立、持有有效商业登记及SABER账户的企业。对于沙特境外（包括中国）制造的家用制冷器具，不存在制造商自我声明路径，也不存在外国实体注册：须由沙特进口商持有SABER注册、PCoC，并在货物于吉达、达曼等港口清关前取得每批货物的SCoC。沙特进口商为责任本地运营商：持有技术文件及检测报告、与SASO批准的合格评定机构对接、配合SASO市场监管，并就产品合规、召回及纠正措施承担责任。此职责不能由货运代理、报关行或检测机构履行——须由已注册的沙特进口实体承担。
summary.zht: 在SASO/SABER制度下，註冊受管制產品並取得產品符合性證書（PCoC）及貨物符合性證書（SCoC）的主體須為沙特境內的進口記錄方——在沙特合法設立、持有有效商業登記及SABER賬戶的企業。對於沙特境外（包括中國）製造的家用製冷器具，不存在製造商自我聲明路徑，也不存在外國實體註冊：須由沙特進口商持有SABER註冊、PCoC，並在貨物於吉達、達曼等港口清關前取得每批貨物的SCoC。沙特進口商為責任本地運營商：持有技術文件及檢測報告、與SASO批准的合格評定機構對接、配合SASO市場監管，並就產品合規、召回及糾正措施承擔責任。此職責不能由貨運代理、報關行或檢測機構履行——須由已註冊的沙特進口實體承擔。

standards_or_laws: SABER platform (saber.sa) — registration must be held by a Saudi-resident importer with valid commercial registration
SASO technical regulations — importer of record responsible for PCoC/SCoC and market-surveillance cooperation
Saudi Customs — SCoC required at port of entry (e.g., Jeddah Islamic Port, Dammam / King Abdulaziz Port)

summary.en: China has no direct regulatory equivalent requiring manufacturers of export-bound products to designate a foreign-country resident legal entity responsible for product compliance and market surveillance cooperation. Chinese export manufacturers typically appoint overseas distributors or trading companies on a commercial basis, without a statutory obligation to register the product under a destination-country importer-of-record system. Under the CCC domestic regime, the certification holder is the responsible party for domestic market compliance — this role and obligation does not extend to or satisfy Saudi SABER market-access requirements.
summary.zh: 中国没有直接的监管等同规定，要求出口产品制造商指定一个在目的国境内设立、负责产品合规及配合市场监管的法定实体。中国出口制造商通常以商业形式委任海外经销商或贸易公司，但不存在在目的国进口记录方制度下注册产品的法定义务。在CCC国内制度下，认证持有人为国内市场合规的责任方——该角色和义务不延伸至沙特SABER市场准入要求，亦不能满足后者。
summary.zht: 中國沒有直接的監管等同規定，要求出口產品製造商指定一個在目的國境內設立、負責產品合規及配合市場監管的法定實體。中國出口製造商通常以商業形式委任海外經銷商或貿易公司，但不存在在目的國進口記錄方制度下註冊產品的法定義務。在CCC國內制度下，認證持有人為國內市場合規的責任方——該角色和義務不延伸至沙特SABER市場准入要求，亦不能滿足後者。

standards_or_laws: N/A — no direct Chinese regulatory equivalent for the Saudi importer-of-record / SABER registration-holder obligation

gap.en: This is a structural gap with no Chinese regulatory analogue. A Chinese refrigerator manufacturer cannot register on SABER or hold a PCoC/SCoC directly: a Saudi-resident importer of record (with commercial registration and a SABER account) must do so before the first shipment. Without a Saudi importer holding a valid PCoC and obtaining a per-shipment SCoC, goods cannot clear Saudi customs at Jeddah or Dammam regardless of the product's underlying test compliance. The Chinese manufacturer's practical obligations are to: (1) appoint or sell through a registered Saudi importer; (2) supply the technical file, SASO-accepted test reports, 230/400 V 60 Hz ratings, and high-ambient (T-class) energy data the importer needs to obtain the PCoC; and (3) supply the Arabic SEEC label artwork. The importer of record bears legal responsibility within Saudi Arabia for compliance and any recall.
gap.zh: 这是一个在中国监管体系中没有类似规定的结构性差距。中国电冰箱制造商不能直接在SABER注册或持有PCoC/SCoC：须由沙特境内进口记录方（持有商业登记及SABER账户）在首次发货前完成。若无持有有效PCoC并取得每批货物SCoC的沙特进口商，无论产品底层检测合规与否，货物均不能在吉达或达曼清关。中国制造商的实际义务为：（1）委任已注册的沙特进口商或通过其销售；（2）提供进口商取得PCoC所需的技术文件、SASO接受的检测报告、230/400 V 60 Hz标定及T类高环境温度能效数据；（3）提供阿拉伯文SEEC标签图样。进口记录方在沙特境内就合规及任何召回承担法律责任。
gap.zht: 這是一個在中國監管體系中沒有類似規定的結構性差距。中國電冰箱製造商不能直接在SABER註冊或持有PCoC/SCoC：須由沙特境內進口記錄方（持有商業登記及SABER賬戶）在首次發貨前完成。若無持有有效PCoC並取得每批貨物SCoC的沙特進口商，無論產品底層檢測合規與否，貨物均不能在吉達或達曼清關。中國製造商的實際義務為：（1）委任已註冊的沙特進口商或通過其銷售；（2）提供進口商取得PCoC所需的技術文件、SASO接受的檢測報告、230/400 V 60 Hz標定及T類高環境溫度能效數據；（3）提供阿拉伯文SEEC標籤圖樣。進口記錄方在沙特境內就合規及任何召回承擔法律責任。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — a Saudi-resident importer of record must hold the SABER registration and PCoC and obtain a per-shipment SCoC before any unit clears Saudi customs; there is no foreign-manufacturer self-registration route
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent requirement — Chinese export manufacturers have no statutory obligation to register under a destination-country importer-of-record system under Chinese law

source.publisher: SABER platform / Saudi Standards, Metrology and Quality Organization (SASO)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Chinese refrigerator manufacturer cannot access the Saudi market alone: a Saudi-resident importer of record must hold the SABER registration and PCoC and obtain a per-shipment SCoC before goods clear customs at Jeddah or Dammam. This is a hard legal gate under the SASO/SABER regime — without a Saudi importer and valid SCoC, the shipment cannot be cleared regardless of product test compliance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国电冰箱制造商无法单独进入沙特市场：须由沙特境内进口记录方持有SABER注册及PCoC，并在货物于吉达或达曼清关前取得每批货物的SCoC。这是SASO/SABER制度下的强制性法律门槛——若无沙特进口商及有效SCoC，无论产品检测合规与否，货物均不能清关。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國電冰箱製造商無法單獨進入沙特市場：須由沙特境內進口記錄方持有SABER註冊及PCoC，並在貨物於吉達或達曼清關前取得每批貨物的SCoC。這是SASO/SABER制度下的強制性法律門檻——若無沙特進口商及有效SCoC，無論產品檢測合規與否，貨物均不能清關。
